sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_divisions (a Int32, b Int32, result Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
UPDATE test_divisions SET result = intDivOrZero(a, b);
SELECT a, b, intDivOrZero(a, b) AS division_result FROM test_divisions;
SELECT intDivOrZero(SUM(a), SUM(b)) AS safe_division FROM test_divisions WHERE b != 0;
